cloudwatch.dashboard.DashboardBody.Docs: The detailed information about the dashboard in JSON format, including the widgets to include and their location on the dashboard. This parameter is required.  For more information about the syntax, see [Dashboard Body Structure and Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/APIReference/CloudWatch-Dashboard-Body-Structure.html).

cloudwatch.dashboard.DashboardName.Docs: The name of the dashboard. The name must be between 1 and 255 characters. If you do not specify a name, one will be generated automatically.
